name: Nginaajiiw Salon & Spa
description: Nginaajiiw Salon & Spa is an Indigenous-owned salon and spa in Sagamok Anishnawbek, founded by Larissa Toulouse. The name Nginaajiiw comes from Anishinaabemowin, reflecting the cultural roots that guide every part of the business. Services include hair styling, esthetics, massage therapy, and nail care. Book online or drop by the salon on Sagamok Road.
address: 610-7 Sagamok Road, Sagamok Anishnawbek, ON P0P 2L0

name: Z'gamok Enterprises Inc.
description: Z'gamok Enterprises is 100% owned by Sagamok Anishnawbek, putting community at the heart of every project. The corporation provides construction, mining support, and economic development services across Northern Ontario. If you're looking for an Indigenous partner on your next project, reach out through their website.

name: Z'gamok Construction LP
description: Z'gamok Construction is an Indigenous-owned company rooted in Sagamok Anishnawbek, specializing in heavy civil construction, ore crushing, haulage, and site maintenance for the mining sector. They bring community values and Northern Ontario know-how to every job site.

name: Serpent River Trading Post
description: The Serpent River Trading Post sits on Highway 17 near Spanish, a community-owned stop that's well worth pulling over for. Inside you'll find an art gallery showcasing First Nation and Canadian fine art, plus a convenience store and seasonal gift shop. Fill up, grab a coffee, and take your time with the artwork.

name: Serpent River First Nation Economic Development Corporation
description: The Serpent River First Nation Economic Development Corporation supports business growth in Serpent River First Nation and the surrounding communities. They offer business development support, partnership opportunities, and growth initiatives — connecting Indigenous entrepreneurs with the resources they need to succeed.

name: Tanner's Your Independent Grocer
description: Tanner's is the locally owned grocery store many of us rely on in Espanola. They carry fresh produce, a bakery, deli, and pharmacy — everything you need in one stop. If you're in the area, it's right on Tudhope Street.

name: Espanola Regional Hospital and Health Centre
description: Espanola Regional Hospital is the acute care facility our communities count on, with 79 beds and services including emergency, diagnostic imaging, rehabilitation, and family health. It's on McKinnon Drive in Espanola, serving the town and surrounding First Nations communities.

name: Cortina Restaurant
description: Cortina is a family-style Italian restaurant in downtown Espanola — a local favourite for homestyle meals. Whether you're meeting friends or feeding the family, it's a welcoming spot in the heart of town.

name: Martins Country Market
description: Martins Country Market is an outdoor market on Highway 17 in Massey, a great stop for local produce and seasonal goods. If you're passing through, pull over and see what's fresh.

name: CJ's Auto and Varieties
description: CJ's Auto and Varieties is on Sable Street in Massey — your go-to for vehicle maintenance and everyday essentials. It's the kind of place where the owner knows your name and takes care of what you need.

name: Massey Area Museum
description: The Massey Area Museum preserves and shares the history of Massey and the surrounding Sables-Spanish Rivers area. It's a good place to connect with the stories of this region — stop in on Sable Street and learn something new.

name: Fireside Classic Restaurant
description: Fireside Classic is a locally owned family restaurant in Elliot Lake serving up classic comfort food in a welcoming atmosphere. If you're in Elliot Lake and hungry, this is the place the locals recommend.

name: Maamwesying North Shore Community Health Services
description: Maamwesying serves North Shore First Nations communities with health programs, mental health support, and wellness services. They're an Indigenous community health organization rooted in the needs of our communities — reach out if you or someone you know could use their support.

name: Sagamok Naandwedjige-Gamik Health Centre
description: Naandwedjige-Gamik is our community wellness centre right here in Sagamok Anishnawbek. They provide health care, health programs, and community wellness services. If you need care close to home, this is where to start.

name: Waubetek Business Development Corporation
description: Waubetek is an Indigenous financial institution that helps Indigenous entrepreneurs across Northeastern Ontario get their ideas off the ground. They offer business development support, loans, and advisory services. If you're thinking about starting or growing a business, Waubetek is a great first call.
